description: Defines the Java Content Repository (JCR) 1.0.1 API for accessing content repositories independently of a specific implementation. It provides standard interfaces, classes, and exceptions for sessions, workspaces, nodes, properties, queries, observation, locking, and versioning.

Defines the Java Content Repository (JCR) 1.0 API for accessing content repositories independently of a specific implementation. It provides the standard javax.jcr interfaces, classes, and exceptions for sessions, workspaces, nodes, properties, queries, observation, locking, and versioning.
